item.title: Recover iPod Contacts Pictures Songs [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover iPod Contacts Pictures Songs [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Recover iPod Contacts Pictures Songs
(Utilities)
Accidentally iPod reset factory setting restoration software is read only, non destructive and provides user friendly graphical user interface. Recovers all types of iPods like iPod mini, iPod nano, iPod apple, iPod shuffle, Samsung, iPod first generation, Sony, iPod next generation, Toshiba. Restore formatted photos, pictures and images like GIF, RIFF, TIFF, JPEG, BMP, PNG and JPG. Utility provides recovery to corrupted AVI, MPEG, WAV, mp3, mp4, m4v, m4b, m4a video files. Support Windows operating systems like Windows longhorn, vista, XP media center 2005, XP, 2003, 2000, 98, NT, ME. Utility can rescue and repairs the different storage devices such as flash memory, compact flash, secure digital, extreme digital cards. Tool detects the undetected sectors due to logical corruption, virus attack, software hardware malfunctioning, improper handling, and system crash. Features: * Software restores the accidentally updated iTunes. * Software recovery tool is read only and non destructive. * Utility supports the long file name (LFN) files. * Support different versions of Windows operating system like Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 * Software provides graphical user interface environment where user can easily navigate. * Recovers data, documents and informations even if system is reformatted. * Tool restores the reset memory factory setting of iPod. * Fetch the data of different storage media brands like Sony, Samsung, and Toshiba. * Detect the undetected sectors due to system crash, virus attack, hardware software malfunctioning, improper handling. * Software recovery is cheap, fast and easily handled. * iPod deleted data recovery software is more accurate and efficient.
[read more]

item.title: FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB
(Virtualization)

[h3] [b] MORE NON ROOTED TWEAKS [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2056054/]1.GODSPEED MODE NO ROOT [/url]
[b] THIS APP HAS MORE THAN 30 OPTIONS TO BOOST ANDROID WITHOUT ROOT[/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2058739/]2.NRFO [/url]
[b] NO TOOT FULL OPTIMIZATION [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2065508/]3.WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER [/url]
[b] IT WILL ALSO OPTIMIZE YOUR DEVICE [/b]

[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]


[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]

[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.
[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./
For 64-bit systems:
./

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash
For 64-bit systems:
bash

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.
[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]

item.title: htop [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: htop [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: aurangzeb
item.itunes:summary:
htop
(System Monitoring)
htop is an interactive system monitor process viewer and process manager. It is designed as an alternative to the Unix program top. It shows a frequently updated list of the processes running on a computer, normally ordered by the amount of CPU usage.

[read more]
item.description:
htop
(System Monitoring)
htop is an interactive system monitor process viewer and process manager. It is designed as an alternative to the Unix program top. It shows a frequently updated list of the processes running on a computer, normally ordered by the amount of CPU usage.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
htop
(System Monitoring)
htop is an interactive system monitor process viewer and process manager. It is designed as an alternative to the Unix program top. It shows a frequently updated list of the processes running on a computer, normally ordered by the amount of CPU usage.

[read more]

item.title: Bulk Text Messaging Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Bulk Text Messaging Software [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk Text Messaging Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Bulk text message sender software helps in how to broadcast the massive sms to targeted marketing, and provide facility to keeping in touch with the clients. Bulk messaging from PC to mobile is an innovative technique for composing and sending text messaging to national and international mobile networks at one time. Software need not requires any internet connection for sending promotional, invitation, job alerts. Software supports Windows operating system such as Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 10 x64,Windows 8. Utility works with mobile phone connected to Microsoft ActiveSync and windows mobile device center and send messages to all GSM or CDMA mobile phones globally. Features: * Software is able to sending text messages to all national or international numbers. * Tool can sends text message in any language that supported by Unicode. * Bulk, messages sender utility is compatible with all Windows based Mobile Phone handsets that is supported by Microsoft ActiveSync and Windows Mobile Device Center. * Software is not need to internet connection is required to send SMS. * Tool is used for messaging to individuals or list of phone numbers from PC to mobile. * Bulk SMS messaging utility used to sends infinite numbers of messages. * Utility has interactive Graphical User Interface (GUI), easy to use and not need any specific technical skills for operating this utility. * Tool does not require any internet connection for messaging. * Utility compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 operating system.

[read more]
item.description:
Bulk Text Messaging Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Bulk text message sender software helps in how to broadcast the massive sms to targeted marketing, and provide facility to keeping in touch with the clients. Bulk messaging from PC to mobile is an innovative technique for composing and sending text messaging to national and international mobile networks at one time. Software need not requires any internet connection for sending promotional, invitation, job alerts. Software supports Windows operating system such as Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 10 x64,Windows 8. Utility works with mobile phone connected to Microsoft ActiveSync and windows mobile device center and send messages to all GSM or CDMA mobile phones globally. Features: * Software is able to sending text messages to all national or international numbers. * Tool can sends text message in any language that supported by Unicode. * Bulk, messages sender utility is compatible with all Windows based Mobile Phone handsets that is supported by Microsoft ActiveSync and Windows Mobile Device Center. * Software is not need to internet connection is required to send SMS. * Tool is used for messaging to individuals or list of phone numbers from PC to mobile. * Bulk SMS messaging utility used to sends infinite numbers of messages. * Utility has interactive Graphical User Interface (GUI), easy to use and not need any specific technical skills for operating this utility. * Tool does not require any internet connection for messaging. * Utility compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 operating system.

[read more]

Bulk Text Messaging Software
(Chat & Messenging)
Bulk text message sender software helps in how to broadcast the massive sms to targeted marketing, and provide facility to keeping in touch with the clients. Bulk messaging from PC to mobile is an innovative technique for composing and sending text messaging to national and international mobile networks at one time. Software need not requires any internet connection for sending promotional, invitation, job alerts. Software supports Windows operating system such as Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 10 x64,Windows 8. Utility works with mobile phone connected to Microsoft ActiveSync and windows mobile device center and send messages to all GSM or CDMA mobile phones globally. Features: * Software is able to sending text messages to all national or international numbers. * Tool can sends text message in any language that supported by Unicode. * Bulk, messages sender utility is compatible with all Windows based Mobile Phone handsets that is supported by Microsoft ActiveSync and Windows Mobile Device Center. * Software is not need to internet connection is required to send SMS. * Tool is used for messaging to individuals or list of phone numbers from PC to mobile. * Bulk SMS messaging utility used to sends infinite numbers of messages. * Utility has interactive Graphical User Interface (GUI), easy to use and not need any specific technical skills for operating this utility. * Tool does not require any internet connection for messaging. * Utility compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 operating system.

[read more]

item.title: FAT Partition Data Rescue [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: FAT Partition Data Rescue [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
FAT Partition Data Rescue
(Utilities)
FAT Data Recovery is a complete data recovery solution that helps you to search, relocate and recover your lost, corrupted, inaccessible or deleted data from any SATA, ATA, PATA or SCSI storage device. Application is non destructive and read-only utility that helps you to retrieve data lost due to accidental format, virus problems, software malfunction, file/directory deletion, unexpected shutdown, or even sabotage. Software is powered by Raw File Recovery feature that recognizes and recovers more than 300 file types including documents, spreadsheets, web content &images. Raw file recovery feature bail you out from the most severe data loss situations. Utility capable to recovers data from Windows Vista partitions and also supports partition recovery from Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 and other Microsoft windows based operating system hard drives. Software able to recovers data from storage media that were formatted from FAT file system. Utility has advance interactive tree structure to view, select (tag) and recover files and directories to a safe location. FAT Data retrieval application comes with two search option one is standard search for retrieve you are lost or deleted files another one is advanced search which helps to recover formatted partitions. Program is efficient disk recovery software providing you a complete answer to data loss. Special Feature: * Software has option which show all deleted file folder before save. * Application has Inbuilt help option which helps both beginners and experts. * Ability to extract files folder even drive is not recognized by desktop or laptop computer. * Retrieve all deleted documents even deleted by using (shift + Del) key. * Easy to use without any special hardware and software requirement. * Work with all Microsoft windows based operating system.

[read more]
item.description:
FAT Partition Data Rescue
(Utilities)
FAT Data Recovery is a complete data recovery solution that helps you to search, relocate and recover your lost, corrupted, inaccessible or deleted data from any SATA, ATA, PATA or SCSI storage device. Application is non destructive and read-only utility that helps you to retrieve data lost due to accidental format, virus problems, software malfunction, file/directory deletion, unexpected shutdown, or even sabotage. Software is powered by Raw File Recovery feature that recognizes and recovers more than 300 file types including documents, spreadsheets, web content &images. Raw file recovery feature bail you out from the most severe data loss situations. Utility capable to recovers data from Windows Vista partitions and also supports partition recovery from Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 and other Microsoft windows based operating system hard drives. Software able to recovers data from storage media that were formatted from FAT file system. Utility has advance interactive tree structure to view, select (tag) and recover files and directories to a safe location. FAT Data retrieval application comes with two search option one is standard search for retrieve you are lost or deleted files another one is advanced search which helps to recover formatted partitions. Program is efficient disk recovery software providing you a complete answer to data loss. Special Feature: * Software has option which show all deleted file folder before save. * Application has Inbuilt help option which helps both beginners and experts. * Ability to extract files folder even drive is not recognized by desktop or laptop computer. * Retrieve all deleted documents even deleted by using (shift + Del) key. * Easy to use without any special hardware and software requirement. * Work with all Microsoft windows based operating system.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
FAT Partition Data Rescue
(Utilities)
FAT Data Recovery is a complete data recovery solution that helps you to search, relocate and recover your lost, corrupted, inaccessible or deleted data from any SATA, ATA, PATA or SCSI storage device. Application is non destructive and read-only utility that helps you to retrieve data lost due to accidental format, virus problems, software malfunction, file/directory deletion, unexpected shutdown, or even sabotage. Software is powered by Raw File Recovery feature that recognizes and recovers more than 300 file types including documents, spreadsheets, web content &images. Raw file recovery feature bail you out from the most severe data loss situations. Utility capable to recovers data from Windows Vista partitions and also supports partition recovery from Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 and other Microsoft windows based operating system hard drives. Software able to recovers data from storage media that were formatted from FAT file system. Utility has advance interactive tree structure to view, select (tag) and recover files and directories to a safe location. FAT Data retrieval application comes with two search option one is standard search for retrieve you are lost or deleted files another one is advanced search which helps to recover formatted partitions. Program is efficient disk recovery software providing you a complete answer to data loss. Special Feature: * Software has option which show all deleted file folder before save. * Application has Inbuilt help option which helps both beginners and experts. * Ability to extract files folder even drive is not recognized by desktop or laptop computer. * Retrieve all deleted documents even deleted by using (shift + Del) key. * Easy to use without any special hardware and software requirement. * Work with all Microsoft windows based operating system.

[read more]

item.title: Undelete NTFS Partition Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Undelete NTFS Partition Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Undelete NTFS Partition Files
(Utilities)
Windows NTFS data restorer utility is the best and reliable files recovery solution for corrupted or formatted hard disks and removable storage devices. Tool supports retrieval of lost data from different cases like accidental deletion, overwritten, formatted, corrupted partition, power failures etc. Hard disk NTFS partition repair utility provides recovery in several data loss situations like boot record failure, corrupt MFT, deleted DBR or MBR files, virus infection etc. Undelete laptop partition data software can bring back all your important folders stored in NTFS file system even if system displays various kind of messages error like boot failure, boot record missing, invalid command, disk error, primary or secondary hard disk failure etc. Corrupted notebook files undelete program provides full support to all windows based operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. NTFS5 partition file system retrieval utility scan inaccessible hard disk for damages and corruptions and restores various types data like music, pictures, video, digital image, photo etc. Notebook Vista files recovery software provides support to long files names stored in windows NTFS partition. Tool can recover files, directories which are deleted partially or completely. Features: * NTFS partition rescue tool retrieve lost MBR, DBR and corrupted MFT file system. * Windows Vista files recovery tool can easily repair corrupt hard disks and any kind of storage media. * Tool can also recover encrypted or compressed NTFS files. * Vista partition recovery tool provides interactive graphical user interface and does not require any technical skill to operate it.

[read more]
item.description:
Undelete NTFS Partition Files
(Utilities)
Windows NTFS data restorer utility is the best and reliable files recovery solution for corrupted or formatted hard disks and removable storage devices. Tool supports retrieval of lost data from different cases like accidental deletion, overwritten, formatted, corrupted partition, power failures etc. Hard disk NTFS partition repair utility provides recovery in several data loss situations like boot record failure, corrupt MFT, deleted DBR or MBR files, virus infection etc. Undelete laptop partition data software can bring back all your important folders stored in NTFS file system even if system displays various kind of messages error like boot failure, boot record missing, invalid command, disk error, primary or secondary hard disk failure etc. Corrupted notebook files undelete program provides full support to all windows based operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. NTFS5 partition file system retrieval utility scan inaccessible hard disk for damages and corruptions and restores various types data like music, pictures, video, digital image, photo etc. Notebook Vista files recovery software provides support to long files names stored in windows NTFS partition. Tool can recover files, directories which are deleted partially or completely. Features: * NTFS partition rescue tool retrieve lost MBR, DBR and corrupted MFT file system. * Windows Vista files recovery tool can easily repair corrupt hard disks and any kind of storage media. * Tool can also recover encrypted or compressed NTFS files. * Vista partition recovery tool provides interactive graphical user interface and does not require any technical skill to operate it.

NTFS5 partition file system retrieval utility scan inaccessible hard disk for damages and corruptions and restores various types data like music, pictures, video, digital image, photo etc. Notebook Vista files recovery software provides support to long files names stored in windows NTFS partition. Tool can recover files, directories which are deleted partially or completely.
